notes: github_actions_config failure: workflow runs `just gen-all` but pnpm is not installed in the runner. Failure is 5 lines (L15763-15767) at the very end of a 15802-line log dominated by cargo crate listings (cargo-binstall enumerating all 200+ Rust crates). Adds another github_actions_config case (v1.3 was 1/16 → v2 has 2). primary_language=rust because the project is biomejs/biome (a Rust workspace) — even though the immediate failing tool is pnpm, that's a CI-orchestration concern. log_size_bucket=large (15802 lines, in 5000-50000 bucket).
